history.text: A republic was declared, changing Central African Republic's political system and state identity.
Central African Republic became independent from France, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Central African Empire was established, giving Central African Republic a new political framework.
Coronation of Bokassa I appears in Central African Republic's historical record.
Bokassa I's overthrow and republic restored introduced a new form of state rule.
